---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this feature solve, or what workflow does it improve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Include UI details if relevant (where would new controls appear, what would they do).

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools.
